items.claim: Abdul Hussein is an undersized bantamweight at 5 foot 5.
items.quote: I think Abdullah Hussein just in general is a very undized bantamweight. This guy is 5 foot five and you can see it in his fights

items.claim: Cody Gibson is absolutely massive for the bantamweight division.
items.quote: Cody Gibson who is absolutely massive for bantamweight. One of the biggest bantamweights maybe in the division.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice and traveling to Abu Dhabi.
items.quote: Cody Gibson is taking this on short notice and also Cody Gibson not only needs to take the fight on short notice, make the weight on short notice, he also needs to go from the United States to Abu Dhabi

items.claim: Cody Gibson was knocked out in 21 seconds in his last fight, raising some durability concerns.
items.quote: he did get knocked out by Archie Long at only 21 seconds in his last one. So Mal maybe it could be time to worry about the chin.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is a very good wrestler who gets multiple takedowns and pushes a high striking pace.
items.quote: Gibson is a very good wrestler. He does get multiple takedowns in the fights that he does win. he can put a very high pace on in the striking.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has very bad takedown accuracy.
items.quote: he does shoot a lot of takedowns, but he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.
